IndexTemplate.title:
Technology
Business-Wise
IndexTemplate.desc: Fractal specializes in providing IT consulting and support solutions to business and industrial customers who expect excellence.
IndexTemplate.mottoText: Fractal's motto is a comprehensive customer service concept that includes defining its needs and their implementation in hardware, software, and system support alongside the core business.

AboutTemplate.heroSubtitle: Fractal specializes in providing computing and IT support solutions to business and industrial customers.
AboutTemplate.card1Text: We build dedicated systems tailored to the client's unique needs. The service includes: Establishment and maintenance of computer networks, information security solutions, software & Auto CAD maintenance, Handling and maintenance of security focal software, etc.
AboutTemplate.yearsText: We have been working for over 20 years in establishing computerized systems tailored to customer needs and in service provision And IT support.
AboutTemplate.experienceText: The company's experience in establishing hundreds of different types of computer networks at Business and industrial customers, the professional care and control of the most advanced technologies In computer and computer communications, We ensure reliable installation and service and optimal fit Of the system for your needs.

timeline.title: Fractal Founded
timeline.desc: We started our journey as a focused system and consulting firm.

timeline.title: Expansion
timeline.desc: We established hundreds of practical networks for institutional bodies.

timeline.title: Giant Partnerships
timeline.desc: Official IT providers for large enterprises and medical systems.

timeline.title: Technology Peak
timeline.desc: Uncompromising service and reliability for the most complex companies.

AboutTemplate.testimonialsSubtitle: What Israel's leading companies and corporations, who have been working with us for decades, have to say.

testimonials.quote: To Fractal Company: Thank you very much for the support and the professional, reliable, and dedicated service you have provided us along the way. We highly recommend any company to work with you; feel free to use us as official references.
testimonials.author: Moked Emun

testimonials.quote: Dear Fractal team, thank you from the bottom of our hearts for the continuous support and professional care you securely and devotedly provide us. We highly recommend you, a first-class strategic supplier.
testimonials.author: T&M Protection Resources

testimonials.quote: We received flawless, fast, and focused service from an IT company that truly understands business, even beyond technology.
testimonials.author: L.K. Ltd

ServicesTemplate.heroSubtitle: We build dedicated systems tailored to the client's unique needs. Our service includes a wide range of Activities: Establishment and maintenance of computer networks, information security solutions, software maintenance and maintenance CAD, handling and maintenance of security focal software, etc.
ServicesTemplate.s1Desc: We’ll meet with you to get a full understanding of your current network design and business operations to find a solution that strikes the right mix of performance and value.
ServicesTemplate.s2Desc: Use flexible data security solutions that will decrease IT risks and increase continuity and stability for your business operations.
ServicesTemplate.s3Desc: Fractal Provides Maintenance Services in Software Management , Request Based Software Services, Maintenance Services For Third Party Software
ServicesTemplate.s4Desc: Our specialists will assess your network and recommend a customized solution that delivers reliable information security and gives your business the freedom to work safely and efficiently.
ServicesTemplate.s5Desc: Whether you need a network service partner that knows how to build a reliable network solution, or need someone to improve your existing network, FRACTAL has the expertise to get you there.
ServicesTemplate.s6Desc: We have certified computer technicians on staff to offer fast, friendly, expert service. With our remote access tools, we can often fix your problem right from our office – no need to travel to your place of business
